stage12_arch_mlp_tune_a.description: Hyperparameter tune A (same stage8 budget): wider LayerNorm MLP with lower PPO learning rates for stability.

stage13_arch_mlp_tune_b.description: Hyperparameter tune B (same stage8 budget): lower learning rate with reduced entropy pressure in phase-1/phase-2.

stage14_arch_mlp_tune_c.description: Hyperparameter tune C (same stage8 budget): moderate learning rate plus more PPO update passes for the wider LayerNorm MLP.
